---
name: summary-generator
description: Generates summaries at various levels of detail. Use this when creating executive summaries, key points, or detailed summaries of documents.
---

Generate summaries in markdown format:
- Executive summary (2-3 sentences)
- Key points (bullet list, 5-10 items)
- Detailed summary (multiple paragraphs)
- Include relevant metadata (source, date, type)
- Preserve important quotes and statistics
- Add tags for easy categorization

Save summaries to workspace/summaries/ with clear naming.

## Summary Template

```markdown
# Summary: [Document Title]

**Source:** [Link to source in references-list.md]
**Date:** [Original date or date analyzed]
**Type:** [Document type]
**Tags:** #tag1 #tag2 #tag3

## Executive Summary

[2-3 sentence overview of the document]

## Key Points

- [Point 1]
- [Point 2]
- [Point 3]
- [Point 4]
- [Point 5]

## Detailed Summary

[Multiple paragraphs providing comprehensive overview]

## Important Quotes

> "[Quote 1]"

> "[Quote 2]"

## Related Documents

- [Link to related summary 1]
- [Link to related summary 2]
```
